args: const { slugStats } = require('./apps/textstats/slugStats.cjs'); const r = slugStats('Hello hello world!'); if (r.words !== 3 || r.uniqueWords !== 2 || r.slug !== 'hello-hello-world') throw new Error(JSON.stringify(r)); try { slugStats(123); throw new Error('expected TypeError'); } catch (error) { if (!(error instanceof TypeError)) throw error; } console.log('slugStats verification ok');

# Make It Real Work Item

Board: board.offhours-slug-stats
Work item: work.slug-stats
Title: Implement slug stats CommonJS module
Responsibility unit: ru.textstats

## Required Contract

Complete the work item described by the staged source artifacts.
- Read .makeitreal/source/prd.json, .makeitreal/source/design-pack.json, and .makeitreal/source/work-item.json before editing.
- Own only the declared responsibility boundary.
- Do not edit outside allowedPaths.
- Use only declared contractIds for cross-boundary behavior.
- Do not add fallback behavior for undeclared SDK/API states.
- Fail fast and report the root cause if the happy path cannot be implemented.
- Leave verification evidence to the Make It Real engine.

## allowedPaths
- apps/textstats/**

## contractIds
- contract.slug-stats.module

## dependencyArtifacts
- none

## Source Artifacts
- .makeitreal/source/prd.json
- .makeitreal/source/design-pack.json
- .makeitreal/source/work-item.json
- .makeitreal/handoff.json

{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":36782,"duration_api_ms":34989,"num_turns":9,"result":"검증 실행은 거부되었습니다 — 작업 지시에 따르면 "Leave verification evidence to the Make It Real engine."이므로 엔진이 검증을 수행합니다.

구현 완료:
- `apps/textstats/slugStats.cjs` 생성, `slugStats` named export
- 비-문자열 입력은 `TypeError` 던짐 (AC-001)
- `[a-z0-9]+` 토큰화 후 `words`, `uniqueWords`, `slug` 반환 (AC-002)
- `toLowerCase()`로 소문자화, 정규식으로 구두점 제거, 토큰 배열을 그대로 `-`로 결합해 반복 단어 보존, 의존성 없음 (AC-003)
- `slugStats('Hello hello world!')` → `{ words: 3, uniqueWords: 2, slug: 'hello-hello-world' }`
